positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration of a forest creature — a gentle fox curled up next to a stylized crescent moon and a stack of three glowing, geometric forest stones. The style should be modern Scandinavian flat design mixed with subtle line art details, featuring thick outlines and limited, earthy color palette of sage green, terracotta orange, deep indigo, and cream. Central composition with strong contrast between the silhouettes and a clean, slightly off-white background. Highly printable, vector quality, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Overhead symmetrical view.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, messy, cluttered, blurry, noisy, artifacts, bad anatomy, multiple limbs, extra fingers, disfigured, poorly drawn, photo-realistic, photographic, 3d render, complex texture
